title: Ensure 'if ... else if' constructs end with 'else' clauses
description:
This rule applies whenever an if statement is followed by one or more else if statements; the final else if should be followed by an else statement.
The requirement for a final else statement is defensive programming.
The else statement should either take appropriate action or contain a suitable comment as to why no action is taken. This is consistent with the requirement to have a final default clause in a switch statement.
recommendation: Ensure the final else if statement is followed by an else statement.
impact: Improves code quality by ensuring proper handling of all conditions.

checks.message: Ensure the final else if statement is followed by an else statement.
